top_signals.title: Oil Gains as Renewed Gulf Attacks Threaten Fragile Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Oil climbed after renewed attacks in the Persian Gulf, as traders await further signs of whether the US and Iran can reach a peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GPU mining malware spreads via SEO poisoning, AI chatbots
top_signals.summary: Threat actors are targeting systems with high-performance computers in an ongoing cryptojacking campaign spread through a coordinated SEO poisoning operation that also manipulated AI chatbot recommendations. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Taiwan-Japan ferry service debuts on ship that has war evacuation role
top_signals.summary: The Yaima Maru is among vessels to be used to evacuate residents on southern Japanese islands to mainland Japan in times of crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Salesforce beats on earnings and revenue but full-year guidance comes in light
top_signals.summary: Salesforce has been hammered by investors on concern that artificial intelligence models and services will disrupt some traditional software products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China AI Upstart MiniMax Doubles Sales Ahead of New Model
top_signals.summary: MiniMax Group Inc.’s annualized revenue more than doubled over the past two months to at least $300 million, as the Chinese AI upstart prepares to roll out its next flagship model to entice developers and enterprise clients.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Markets ‘Too Complacent’ Around Impact of Inflation, PGIM’s Peters Says
top_signals.summary: Gregory Peters, co-chief investment officer at PGIM Credit, says he sees "shock, after shock, after shock" in markets. "That leads to higher inflation," Peters says, adding this has an impact on central banks' interest-rate positioning. He speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
top_signals.summary: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US charges Google engineer with using internal search data to pocket $1.2 million on Polymarket
top_signals.summary: Prosecutors charged Spagnuolo with fraud and money laundering, while the CFTC filed a complaint alleging insider trading violations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
